_note: WELLBEING-GUARDED (CC-09). Bands tile logging_consistency (0..1). Leads with logging and consistency; never publishes an aggressive numeric rate — the deficit pace defers to get_deficit_sustainability. concern_watches are supportive/correlative only, never restrictive instructions. Down-weeks always visible. Hand-review before ship (Marcus/Maya/Henning).

stage_ladder.headline: First, I just need to see what you eat.
stage_ladder.read_of_him: I can't coach what I can't see. Right now the only job is logging — honestly, not perfectly.
cares_most: no shame about what's in them
stage_ladder.plan: Build the logging habit. Once we can see the pattern, we tune gently toward a sustainable, protein-forward way of eating — pace set by the deficit-sustainability monitor, not a number I hand you.
stage_ladder.graduation_gate: Logging six of seven days for two weeks unlocks the 'consistency' rung.

stage_ladder.headline: Good — now let's make it a habit, not a chore.
stage_ladder.read_of_him: You're logging often enough that I can start to see real patterns. Let's reinforce the habit and add protein, gently.
concern_watches: days with no food logged at all
intake far below your usual baseline
stage_ladder.plan: Steady the habit and lean protein-forward. We talk about patterns, not punishments. Any deficit stays in the range the sustainability monitor says is safe.
stage_ladder.graduation_gate: Logging most days for a month, protein trending up, unlocks the 'tune' rung.

stage_ladder.headline: Now we can actually tune it.
stage_ladder.read_of_him: The logging is reliable, so the numbers mean something. We aim for a sustainable, protein-forward deficit — and we celebrate the down-weeks and ride out the flat ones.
cares_most: a sustainable deficit (pace per the sustainability monitor)
cares_less_right_now: chasing the scale day to day
stage_ladder.plan: Hold a protein-forward intake at a deficit the deficit-sustainability monitor rates as sustainable. Trend over weeks, down-weeks shown, no crash targets.
stage_ladder.graduation_gate: This is the working rung — consistency and sustainability are the goal, not a finish line.
